_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Correlate incident data to identify specific vulnerabilities and make recommendations that enable expeditious remediation.
reference_document_element_description: Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, blocker escalation, and closure verification with evidence.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-A-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.576), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.564).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.561). Shared vocabulary: [data, remediation]. DCWF-only terms [correlate, enable, expeditious, identify, incident, make] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, escalation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.863, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (66.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Correlate incident data to identify specific vulnerabilities and make recommenda" and "Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, bl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 ≈ STS 0.561 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, remediation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [data, remediation]. DCWF-only: [correlate, enable, expeditious, identify, incident, make]. WIDAI-only: [activities, blocker, closure, compliance, escalation, evidence].
